prompt: Simple minimal clock icon, round circle with two hands pointing to 6 o'clock position. Orange color #d74f1d. Only the clock outline and two hands, nothing else. Clean white background. Ultra minimal, no numbers, no decorations, no extra details. Flat design icon style.
negative_prompt: realistic, 3D, detailed, complex, numbers on clock, decorative, gradients, shadows, texture, checkered background
